name: 80° North
overview: Eight sailors, filmmakers and adventurers pile into a 48 ft sailboat with the goal of exploring and capturing the beauty of Svalbard, the Northernmost settlement in the world, only 600 miles from the North Pole. The sailing expedition brings 24 hours of sunlight, dangerous glacial ice flows and up-close encounters with polar bears, beluga whales, walrus' and much more! After 2.5 years of post production and over 2000 hours of editing it's time to bring YOU our biggest project yet!

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER - 80 North: Sailing on top of the world! ( WATCH NOW! 80northseries.com )
